calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declartion, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Concorde Transport, Inc., Katrina Konini and Leka Konini as follows:
Principal $88,371.34
Prejudgment Interest $4,326.96
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $520.00 for a total of $95,718.30
Plaintiff is also entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Off Calendar
